passives.name: Amphibian
passives.description: Increases your experience gain with the Restoration Staff skill line by 15%. Increases your swimming speed by 50%.

passives.name: Argonian Resistance
passives.description: Increases your Max Health by 1000 and your Disease and Poison Resistance by 2310.

passives.name: Resourceful
passives.description: Increases your Max Magicka and Max Stamina by 1000. When you drink a potion, you restore 3125 Health, Magicka, and Stamina.
